SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server

Class Lobby

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.Lobby
All Implemented Interfaces:
Controller
public class Lobby extends Object implements Controller
The Lobby class implements the Controller interface to manage lobby-related functionality and interactions. This controller is responsible for coordinating actions and behaviors before a player enters a game.

  • Constructor Details

    • Lobby

      public Lobby(GameManager gameManager, Server server)
      Creates an instance of Lobby with the specified values.
      Parameters:
      gameManager - the GameManager of the game.
      server - the Server of the game.

  • Method Details

    • createGame

      public void createGame(int numOfPlayers, String thisPlayer, int clientID)
      Creates a new Game with the specified values and allows the player who initiated it to join. This method ensures that the number of players specified is between 2 and 4 inclusive. If the number of players is not within this range, an ExceptionMessage is sent.
      Parameters:
      numOfPlayers - The number of players of the game (should be between 2 and 4).
      thisPlayer - The username of the player creating the game.
      clientID - the ID of the Client requesting to create the game.

    • joinExistingGame

      public void joinExistingGame(String nick, int idGame, int clientID)
      Allows a player to join an existing game. It checks several conditions before allowing the player to join:
      • If the game ID is not found in the GameManager's list.
      • If the game is already full.
      • If the username provided is already taken in that game.
      If any of these conditions are met, an ExceptionMessage is sent to notify the client. When a player joins a game that becomes full, the game is automatically set to start.
      Parameters:
      nick - The username of the player wanting to join the game.
      idGame - The ID of the game that the player wants to join.
      clientID - The ID of the Client requesting to join the game.

    • getGameList

      public void getGameList(int ClientID)
      Sends a sendGameListMessage containing the list of active games to the specified client.
      Parameters:
      ClientID - The ID of the client requesting to receive the game list.

    • getGameServerInstance

      public GameServerInstance getGameServerInstance(int idGame)
      Retrieves the GameServerInstance associated with a specified game ID.
      Parameters:
      idGame - The ID of the game for which the GameServerInstance is requested.
      Returns:
      The GameServerInstance of the specified game.

    • checkIfGameNeedsToBeStarted

      public void checkIfGameNeedsToBeStarted(int gameID)
      Checks if a game needs to be started after a player joins. This method examines whether the specified game identified by gameID has reached its full capacity. If the game is full, it starts the game.
      Parameters:
      gameID - The ID of the game to be checked.
